message:
test(snapshots): update TUI snapshots for improved word-wrap and layout

Regenerate all affected insta snapshots to reflect:
- Detail pane metadata line now word-wraps long fields (ws_orig) to the
  next line instead of hard-truncating, improving readability.
- Search surface detail panel now properly wraps long snippet text with
  correct whitespace instead of leaving blank padding lines.
- One fewer blank padding line in detail views due to the additional
  wrapped metadata line consuming that space.

These changes are a consequence of the rendering improvements in app.rs
(width-aware span layout and improved text wrapping).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
